cases.prompt: Next.js 사이트 LCP 느려. 2.5초 넘어. 원인 찾아서 고쳐줘

assertions.text: The agent checks for raw tags and recommends next/image with priority + sizes + width/height.
The agent asks about render strategy (SSG/ISR/SSR/CSR) for the slow page.
The agent checks initial bundle size and suggests dynamic imports for heavy components.
